name: Robert Ashton
title: Chief Executive Officer & Head of Equities
bio: Dynamic leader with 29 years in financial services. Founded Premier Financial Services with focus on institutional equity management. Manages $325B across global markets with emphasis on long-term capital appreciation.

name: Catherine Liu
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Senior investment strategist overseeing all portfolio decisions across asset classes. 25 years institutional investing experience with demonstrated skill in multi-asset class management.

name: Marcus Blackwell
title: Head of Equity Research
bio: Leads 35-person research team conducting in-depth fundamental analysis of 1,500+ companies. Pioneered proprietary ESG integration framework for sustainable equity investing.

name: Natasha Volkov
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Value Equities
bio: Manages $105B value-focused equity fund with 18-year track record of consistent outperformance. Expert in deep value opportunities and activist engagement strategies.

name: Sung Park
title: Head of Fixed Income
bio: Oversees $78B in fixed income investments across credit quality spectrum. 22 years fixed income expertise with specialization in credit selection and yield enhancement strategies.

name: Jennifer White
title: Portfolio Manager - Small Cap Equities
bio: Manages $52B in small and mid-cap equity fund. 16 years experience identifying underfollowed opportunities with strong pattern of alpha generation.

name: Giovanni Rossi
title: Equity Analyst - Financial Services
bio: Senior analyst specializing in banking, insurance, and asset management companies. 13 years sector expertise with deep regulatory and competitive landscape knowledge.

name: Priya Menon
title: Trader - Equities
bio: Executes multi-billion dollar equity trading operations globally. 15 years trading experience with expertise in algorithmic execution and market microstructure optimization.

name: Klaus Bergmann
title: Strategist - Macroeconomic Research
bio: Provides macroeconomic analysis and asset allocation guidance. PhD in Economics with 18 years researching business cycle dynamics and monetary policy impacts on markets.

name: Maria Santos
title: Director of Investments - Emerging Markets
bio: Directs emerging market equity investing strategy across Asia, Latin America, and Africa. 17 years emerging markets experience with strong track record in frontier market discoveries.
